book_visual_context: cinematic readable reference lighting, classic adventure visual style, non-modern clothing, weathered natural materials

character_fallbacks.general: cinematic readable reference lighting, classic adventure visual style, non-modern clothing, weathered natural materials; non-modern character styling; avoid contemporary portrait fashion unless explicitly described
character_fallbacks.human_period: period-appropriate human clothing, practical natural fabrics, simple closures, worn footwear, no modern business or athletic styling unless explicitly described
character_fallbacks.humanoid_fantasy: storybook humanoid styling, color-coded regional costume, practical garments, magical or ceremonial accents only when supported by source evidence
character_fallbacks.humanoid_speculative: non-modern speculative humanoid styling, unfamiliar materials or ornaments when supported, coherent culture-specific costume logic, no contemporary Earth fashion
character_fallbacks.creature_or_animal: source-appropriate animal or creature anatomy, readable scale, natural texture, movement-ready silhouette, minimal gear only when supported
character_fallbacks.group_or_crowd: coherent group visual language with shared era, region, role, palette, and material logic while preserving individual variation

environment_fallbacks.general: cinematic readable reference lighting, classic adventure visual style, non-modern clothing, weathered natural materials; clear cinematic location reference with explicit landmarks, scale, materials, lighting, and atmosphere
environment_fallbacks.desert_mountain: rugged desert mountain terrain, dry scrub, weathered rock, clear horizon, readable distance and scale
environment_fallbacks.cave_or_cliffside: visible cave mouth, cliffside rock face, rocky threshold, shadowed interior, weathered stone, readable entrance landmark
environment_fallbacks.interior: clear room or chamber layout, foreground midground background separation, pathways, anchor objects, visible scale
environment_fallbacks.wilderness: natural terrain with distinct foreground, midground, background, landmarks, lighting, and weather atmosphere

notes: Generated fallback text is descriptor-heavy by design and should not depend on image models knowing the source title.
Fallbacks are inferred visual guidance, not explicit canon unless supported by source artifacts.
